zh.lifeSummary: 當James Trowbridge於1410年出生在英國英格蘭戴文普萊姆斯代文波特時，他的父親Sir John Trowbridge15歲，母親Maria Walter15歲。他於大約1431年與Sarah Nott在英國英格蘭戴文艾可謝特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1500年在英國英格蘭戴文可雷迪頓享年90歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭戴文可雷迪頓霍利 克羅斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当James Trowbridge于1410年出生在英国英格兰戴文普萊姆斯代文波特时，他的父亲Sir John Trowbridge15岁，母亲Maria Walter15岁。他于大约1431年与Sarah Nott在英国英格兰戴文艾可謝特结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1500年在英国英格兰戴文可雷迪頓享年90岁，埋葬在英国英格兰戴文可雷迪頓霍利 克羅斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Trowbridge
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Dorset, Wiltshire and Hampshire): habitational name from Trowbridge in Wiltshire, named from Old English trēow ‘tree’ + brycg ‘bridge’; the name probably referred to a felled trunk serving as a rough-and-ready bridge.

nameMeanings.name: James
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name borne in the New Testament by two of Christ's disciples, James son of Zebedee and James son of Alphaeus. This form comes from Late Latin Iacomus, a variant of Iacobus, Latin form of Greek Iakobos. This is the same name as Old Testament Jacob (Hebrew Yaakov), but for many centuries now they have been thought of in the English-speaking world as two distinct names. In Britain, James is a royal name that from the beginning of the 15th century onwards was associated particularly with the Scottish house of Stewart: James I of Scotland ( 1394–1437 ; ruled 1424–37 ) was a patron of the arts and a noted poet, as well as an energetic ruler. King James VI of Scotland ( 1566–1625 ; reigned 1567–1625 ) succeeded to the throne of England in 1603 . His grandson, James II of England ( 1633–1701 ; reigned 1685–8 ) was a Roman Catholic, deposed in 1688 in favour of his Protestant daughter Mary and her husband William of Orange. From then on he, his son (also called James), and his grandson Charles (‘Bonnie Prince Charlie’) made various unsuccessful attempts to recover the English throne. Their supporters were known as Jacobites (from Latin Iacobus), and the name James became for a while particularly associated with Roman Catholicism on the one hand, and Highland opposition to the English government on the other. Nevertheless, it has since become one of the most perennially popular boys' names.

en.lifeSummary: When James Trowbridge was born in 1410, in Devonport, Plymouth, Devon, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir John Trowbridge, was 15 and his mother, Maria Walter, was 15. He married Sarah Nott about 1431, in Exeter, Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1500, in Crediton, Devon, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 90, and was buried in Holy Cross Church, Crediton, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

ko.Holy Cross Church, Crediton, Devon, Ingl: 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 크레딧 홀이 크로스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: James Trowbridge(이)가 1410년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 플림우스 데폰포트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Trowbridge(은)는 15세였고, 그의 어머니 Maria Walter(은)는 15세였다. 그는 대략 1431년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 세터에서 Sarah Nott(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1500년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 크레딧에서 90세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 크레딧 홀이 크로스 c후르치에 묻혔다.

ru.Holy Cross Church, Crediton, Devon, Ingl: холи кросс чурч, кредитон, девон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда James Trowbridge родился в 1410 г. в местности девонпорт, плимоут, девон, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir John Trowbridge было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Maria Walter, 15. Он женился на женщине по имени Sarah Nott около 1431 г. в местности эксетир, девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1500 г. в местности кредитон, девон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 90 лет и был похоронен в местности холи кросс чурч, кредитон, девон, Англия, Великобритания.
